---
title: "update_gemini_manifest.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\update_gemini_manifest.py"
loc: 86
complexity: 11
logic_score: 4.85
style_score: 4.07
intel_score: 3.26
overall_score: 2.34
---

## Intent
The `update_gemini_manifest.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on update_manifest, ManifestOrchestrator, _get_git_summary, _get_task_status, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via update_manifest, ManifestOrchestrator, _get_git_summary, _get_task_status, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 35 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `update_manifest`
- `ManifestOrchestrator`
- `_get_git_summary`
- `_get_task_status`
- `execute`
